title: SpaceInvite code 40-bit entropy
description: Invite code uses ULID chars 10-18 (8 Crockford base32 chars from random portion) = 40 bits. With guessing attacks against a shared relay, probability of hitting a valid invite code is non-negligible at scale. Fix: use 16 chars (80 bits) from random portion or use crypto/rand directly.
close_reason: already fixed: invite code now uses Ulid[10..26] = 80-bit entropy
